name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN is a national pawn shop chain offering collateral-based cash loans, gold/jewelry buying, firearms services, and discounted pre-owned merchandise at its Las Vegas location.
description_long:
EZPAWN is a large national pawn shop chain with a location at 1501 E. Charleston Blvd. in Las Vegas, NV. As part of the broader EZPAWN family of stores, this location operates as a full-service pawn and retail shop serving the local Las Vegas community. The chain positions itself around convenience and accessibility, offering multiple ways to access cash quickly through collateral-based lending.

The store offers a broad range of financial and retail services. Core offerings include pawn loans — customers bring in items of value and receive cash loans with the option to redeem items later. EZPAWN also buys gold, diamonds, and broken jewelry of any karat weight, as well as firearms (rifles, shotguns, handguns). On the retail side, the store sells thousands of pre-owned brand-name items — electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, musical instruments, handbags, and sneakers — at 25% to 70% below new retail prices. Auto loans are also listed as a special category at this specific location.

Several features differentiate this location from independent pawn shops. The EZ+ Rewards Program allows customers to manage pawns, layaways, and reward points online and make digital payments on extensions and layaways. An Instant Quote tool lets customers get an estimated loan value for electronics before visiting the store. Flexible purchase options include layaway (10% down, monthly payments) and a Take Today program through third-party financing partners offering up to 12 months of installment payments. Product and jewelry protection plans are also available at purchase.

EZPAWN fills a real need for consumers who need fast cash and lack access to traditional credit, or who want deeply discounted brand-name goods. However, pawn loan fees and specific terms are not disclosed on the website — customers must visit the store to learn the cost of borrowing. Loan amounts are entirely dependent on the store's discretion and item condition, and all merchandise is pre-owned. For those comfortable with these tradeoffs, EZPAWN offers a more structured and technology-enabled experience than most independent pawn shops.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program lets customers manage pawns, layaways, and reward points online without visiting the store
Instant Quote tool provides estimated loan value for electronics before arriving in person
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25%-70% below new retail on brand-name items
Layaway available with only 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Firearms loans and purchases offered at this location with secure on-site storage
Take Today installment payment option via third-party partners (up to 12+ months depending on eligibility)
Extended weekday and Saturday hours (9am-7pm) with Sunday availability
cons: Pawn loan fees and APR are not disclosed on the website — terms only available in-store
Firearm appraisal amounts are entirely at the sole discretion of each location with no published guidance
Online payments not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania; not all services offered at all locations
Sunday hours are significantly reduced (12pm-5pm only)
All retail merchandise is pre-owned — no new items sold, and inventory varies daily with no guarantees
best_for: Las Vegas residents who need same-day cash and have electronics, jewelry, or firearms to use as collateral
Bargain shoppers looking for discounted brand-name electronics, jewelry, or tools at 25-70% off retail
People wanting to sell gold, diamonds, or broken jewelry for immediate cash
Shoppers who need flexible layaway or installment payment options on pre-owned purchases
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for Las Vegas consumers who need fast cash against valuables or want deeply discounted pre-owned goods with flexible payment options. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs — fees and effective APR — are never disclosed upfront, so borrowers should carefully review terms in-store before agreeing to a loan.
services: EZ+ Rewards Program with online pawn and layaway management
Take Today third-party installment financing (up to 12+ months)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and A/V equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amount, trade-up, stone replacement, cleaning)
Online shop with daily new arrivals
